name: IVANS Insurance Distribution Connectivity API
what_it_does: IVANS (Applied Systems subsidiary) insurance distribution connectivity REST API and EDI network for carrier-to-agency policy download, upload, and data exchange automation between insurance carriers and independent agencies. Enables AI agents to manage policy change and renewal download from carriers to agency management systems for automated policy data synchronization, handle billing and payment data download for agency cash receipts automation, access claims status download for agency client service automation, retrieve appetite and eligibility inquiry for commercial lines placement automation, manage market appetite broadcasting for carrier new business submission routing, handle agency upload of new business submissions and endorsement requests for straight-through processing automation, access eSignature and policy delivery workflow for digital policy issuance automation, retrieve agency diagnostics and download monitoring for connectivity health automation, manage carrier portal single sign-on for agency carrier access automation, and integrate IVANS with Applied Epic, Vertafore AMS360, HawkSoft, and Nexsure for agency management system carrier connectivity.
use_cases: Downloading policy changes from carrier connectivity agents
Routing new business from appetite matching agents
Syncing claims status from client service automation agents
Monitoring download health from agency connectivity agents
best_when: An insurance carrier wanting to distribute policy data to independent agencies, or an independent agency wanting AI agents to automate policy download, billing sync, claims status, and carrier connectivity management via the IVANS network.
avoid_when: IVANS DOWNLOAD CARRIER PARTICIPATION DEPENDENCY: Automated policy download via IVANS depends on carrier implementing IVANS connectivity; not all carriers participate in IVANS download; automated policy data sync for non-IVANS-connected carriers falls back to manual entry; verify carrier IVANS participation before building download-dependent automation. POLICY DOWNLOAD LATENCY FOR REAL-TIME OPERATIONS: IVANS policy download has carrier-dependent latency (minutes to hours) from policy change to download availability; automated client communication triggered on IVANS download data may be delayed relative to actual policy change; implement data freshness check before time-sensitive client communications. AMS FIELD MAPPING ACCURACY FOR DOWNLOAD DATA: IVANS download data maps to agency management system fields via carrier-AMS field mapping configuration; incorrect field mapping in IVANS download configuration creates systematic data errors in agency management system (wrong limits, incorrect premium, missing endorsements); validate field mapping in staging environment before production download automation.

auth.notes: IVANS uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON and EDI ACORD AL3 format. Tampa, Florida HQ (Applied Systems subsidiary). IVANS founded 1983. Acquired by Applied Systems 2012. Industry standard insurance EDI download/upload network. 32,000+ agency locations, 300+ carrier connections. Policy download, billing download, claims status, appetite and eligibility. Carrier API and EDI integration for independent agency channel. IVANS Messaging platform for carrier-agency data exchange. Competes with EZLynx carrier connectivity and direct carrier portal integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — carrier and agency annual subscription for IVANS network connectivity
pricing.paid_tiers: Carrier: annual subscription per line of business/download type; Agency: included with Applied Epic or Vertafore AMS360 subscription; standalone IVANS subscription for other AMS platforms
pricing.notes: Tampa FL (Applied Systems subsidiary). Founded 1983. 32,000+ agency locations. Annual subscription for carriers; bundled with Applied/Vertafore AMS for agencies. EDI ACORD AL3 and REST connectivity.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; download polling and message retrieval throttled; webhooks for new download availability

known_agent_gotchas: CARRIER IVANS PARTICIPATION REQUIRED FOR DOWNLOAD: Automated policy download automation assumes carrier has IVANS download connection configured; approximately 300 carriers have IVANS connectivity but 3,000+ carriers write insurance; automated download-dependent workflows must implement fallback for non-IVANS carriers; build carrier IVANS participation lookup before assuming automated download availability

ACORD AL3 EDI FORMAT FOR LEGACY DOWNLOADS: IVANS download traditionally uses ACORD AL3 EDI format (not JSON REST); some legacy carrier connections still deliver AL3 EDI data; automated parsing of IVANS download must handle both AL3 EDI and newer REST/JSON download formats; do not assume all carriers have migrated to REST-based IVANS download

AMS FIELD MAPPING CONFIGURATION REQUIRED: IVANS download-to-AMS field mapping is configured per carrier-AMS combination; incorrect field mapping creates systematic data errors in AMS policy records; automated download processing must include field mapping validation in staging environment before production; contact IVANS carrier team for mapping specification documentation

DUPLICATE DOWNLOAD PREVENTION ON RETRY: IVANS download message queue may redeliver messages on acknowledgment failure; automated AMS update triggered on IVANS download must implement idempotency on IVANS message ID to prevent duplicate policy updates, duplicate billing records, or duplicate claims status entries on message retry

DOWNLOAD LATENCY FOR CARRIER BATCH PROCESSING: Some carriers batch IVANS download processing overnight or on business day cadence; automated client communication or billing workflows that depend on real-time IVANS policy data may encounter hours-long latency relative to actual carrier policy change; implement download data timestamp validation before time-sensitive operations

APPETITE QUERY RESPONSE VARIABILITY: IVANS appetite and eligibility inquiry responses vary by carrier configuration (some return structured JSON, some return narrative text, some return portal redirect); automated commercial lines placement routing built on IVANS appetite response must handle heterogeneous response formats across participating carriers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance distribution network. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Policy, billing, claims status, and agent/carrier connectivity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance distribution EDI network. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Policy data, billing, and agency-carrier connectivity.
